sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports feeling a burning sensation in their chest, particularly when walking. He also reports nasal congestion due to allergies. He states the chest pain is not severe.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: The patient's blood pressure is 118/72 mmHg. Heart rate is 78 bpm. The echocardiogram shows a slight three out of six systolic ejection murmur. The lungs are clear to auscultation.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has coronary artery disease and reports recurrent chest pain. He also has a history of mitral regurgitation.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor ordered a cardiac stress test. A lipid panel will be ordered. The patient will start crestor 20 mg once a day. The patient will continue on aspirin. The patient will continue on toprol.
